name: Ko Hana Distillers
tagline: Oahu's only rum distillery — Hawaiian agricole rum made from 34 heritage sugarcane varieties grown on-site.
hours: Tours and tastings daily; check schedule
bestTime: Reserve ahead on weekends; weekday tastings are more intimate
talkStory: Oahu's only rum distillery produces Hawaiian agricole rum from 34 heritage varieties of Hawaiian sugarcane grown on-site. The tasting room tour explains how pre-contact Hawaiians cultivated ko (sugarcane) and how each heirloom variety produces a different flavor. The tasting flight includes single-varietal rums unlike anything you've had. Locals bring visitors here as a proudly Hawaiian alternative to wine tasting. The agricultural setting in Kunia is beautiful.
